title: boe / balance sheet / reserve balances | Balance Sheet Update | Bank of England Weekly Report 25 March 2026
summary: The Bank of England published its weekly balance sheet data as of 25 March 2026, showing reserves balances increased to £647.6 billion from £637.0 billion the prior week. Short-term repo operations rose to £98.1 billion, while the Loan to Asset Purchase Facility remained unchanged at £553.2 billion.
